title: Normie mode misfires on greetings
evidence: Ash: hey sup → Pi: Not in this conversation. Switch to root mode — memory tools work there.
root_cause: normie mode_block in agent/prompt.py opened with 'YOU ARE NOT IN ROOT MODE / ABSOLUTE RULES' framing, causing Groq to default to announcing limitations on every turn instead of only on explicit tool-action requests
fix: Rewrote normie mode_block with routing-first structure: respond normally by default; refusal table only fires on explicit keywords (remember, save, run, execute, read file). Dropped NOT NEGOTIABLE / ABSOLUTE RULES tone.
